description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single job named build-image that runs in the default stage using the docker image and the docker:dind service. The job installs curl via apk, logs into the GitLab Container Registry with the CI build token, checks if an artifact for the current branch exists via curl and sets build_version to either artifacts/<branch> or artifacts/master, optionally overrides it with FORCE_RANCHER_GEN_VERSION, determines the tag as "latest" for master or the branch name otherwise, builds a Docker image with the build argument VERSION_RANCHER_GEN set to the chosen build_version and tags it as registry.gitlab.com/adi90x/rancher-active-proxy:<tag>, then pushes the image to the registry. No caches, artifacts, or rules are defined.
